final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing editorial photo for a Weibo news/hot topic banner.

Style/medium: documentary photography, on-site mobile phone capture aesthetic
Composition: 16:9 wide banner, horizontal extension, ample negative space for text overlay
Subject: city skyline at dusk, pedestrians in motion, distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset
Scene/backdrop: urban twilight cityscape, neon lights beginning to glow, sunset glow reflecting on high-rise buildings
Lighting/mood: dramatic light and shadow contrast, golden hour transitioning to neon, authentic on-site atmosphere
Color palette: warm sunset tones blending with cool neon
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻", "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙", "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察"
Constraints: 16:9 aspect ratio, wide banner format, professional editorial quality, suitable for Weibo news/hot topic post
Avoid:
